title: Acrylic Festive Christmas 30CM Warm White LED Gingerbread Man Battery Operated, Outdoor Holiday Decoration
features: Whimsical Acrylic Gingerbread Man Design: This festive 30CM gingerbread man features 30 warm white LEDs, creating a cheerful and welcoming light for your outdoor holiday décor.
Durable Acrylic Construction: Made from high-quality acrylic, this LED gingerbread man is built to last and withstand outdoor conditions, bringing joy season after season.
Festive Warm White Glow: The 30 warm white LEDs provide a cozy, inviting glow, perfect for adding a touch of holiday magic to your garden, yard, or patio.
Battery-Powered Flexibility: Powered by 3xAA batteries (not included), this gingerbread man decoration offers easy placement without the need for electrical outlets.
Includes a 30CM lead cable for simple installation, allowing you to position this decoration wherever it’s needed in your outdoor space.
description: Celebrate the holiday season with this charming Acrylic 31CM Gingerbread Man LED decoration. Made from durable acrylic, it features 30 warm white LEDs that create a festive glow. The gingerbread man design adds a whimsical touch to your outdoor decor, whether in the garden, on the porch, or as part of a larger holiday display. Powered by 3xAA batteries (not included), this decoration offers flexibility in placement and comes with a 31CM leading cable for easy setup. Perfect for spreading holiday cheer, this Acrylic LED gingerbread man is a delightful addition to your outdoor Christmas decorations.
